2605.00969.title: MedMosaic: A Challenging Large Scale Benchmark of Diverse Medical Audio
2605.00969.paper_summary: We present MedMosaic, a medical audio question-answering dataset designed to benchmark language and audio reasoning models under realistic clinical constraints. Medical audio data is difficult to collect due to privacy regulations and high annotation costs arising from domain expertise. Thus, existing benchmarks tend to underrepresent complex medical audio scenarios. To address these challenges, MedMosaic features a diverse range of medical audio types, including condition-related physiological sounds, carefully constructed synthetic voices to mimic speech with artifacts as well as real short and long length clinical conversations to model varying context lengths. The dataset also features a total of 46,701 question-answer pairs, spanning categories such as multiple-choice, sequential multi-turn, and open-ended question-answers, enabling systematic evaluation of multi-hop reasoning and answer generation capabilities. Benchmarking 13 audio and multimodal reasoning models reveals that reasoning remains challenging for all evaluated systems, with substantial performance variation across question types. In particular, even state-of-the-art model like Gemini-2.5-pro can only achieve 68.1% accuracy approximately. These findings underscore persistent limitations in medical reasoning and highlight the need for more robust, domain-specific multimodal reasoning models.
2605.00969.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了 MedMosaic，一個醫療音頻問答數據集，旨在在現實臨床約束下基準化語言和音頻推理模型。由於隱私法規和來自領域專業知識的高標註成本，醫療音頻數據難以收集。因此，現有的基準往往低估了複雜的醫療音頻場景。為了解決這些挑戰，MedMosaic 特別包含了多樣的醫療音頻類型，包括與病症相關的生理聲音、精心構建的合成語音以模仿帶有伪影的語音，以及真實的短期和長期臨床對話，以模擬不同的上下文長度。該數據集還包含總共 46,701 對問答，涵蓋多選題、連續多輪和開放式問答等類別，能夠系統性地評估多跳推理和答案生成能力。對 13 種音頻和多模態推理模型的基準測試顯示，推理對所有評估系統來說仍然具有挑戰性，並且在問題類型之間存在顯著的性能變化。特別是，即使是最先進的模型如 Gemini-2.5-pro 也僅能達到約 68.1% 的準確率。這些發現強調了醫療推理中的持續限制，並突顯了對更強大、領域特定的多模態推理模型的需求。
2605.00969.author: Harshit Rajgarhia et.al.
2605.00969.authors: Harshit Rajgarhia, Shuubham Ojha, Asif Shaik, Akhil Pothanapalli, Rachuri Lokesh, Abhishek Mukherji, Prasanna Desikan
